query:
-- Match via billing_items: find the Xero customer for each Channel Haus service code
-- The service code in the portal (e.g. bsip_AlbyFDocsOut) should appear in billing item descriptions
SELECT bi.description, bi.contactName, bi.contactExternalId, bi.lineAmount
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.description LIKE '%AlbyFDocs%' OR bi.description LIKE '%Albany Family%'
LIMIT 5;
